title: Five More Minutes
lyrics:
[verse]
Mama said it's time for bed
But I've got things to do instead
I haven't hugged the cat goodnight
I haven't checked the moon is bright

[chorus]
Five more minutes, please please please
Five more minutes on my knees
Five more minutes, that's all I need
Then five more minutes after that

[verse]
I need some water, need a snack
I think there's something under the bed, go check
My pillow's wrong, my blanket's cold
This is the saddest story ever told

[chorus]
Five more minutes, please please please
Five more minutes on my knees
Five more minutes, that's all I need
Then five more minutes after that

[bridge]
Okay okay I'll close my eyes
But only for a tiny while
I'm not even sleepy, not one bit
I'm just... resting... my eyes... a... little...

[chorus]
Five more... min... utes...
Goodnight
style_prompt: children's song, sweet and funny, soft acoustic guitar, xylophone, light claps, 110 BPM, warm child-like vocal, gentle and silly, like a lullaby that keeps arguing, cute and stubborn, bedtime energy
cover_description: A tiny child in pajamas kneeling dramatically beside a bed, hands clasped together begging, a sleepy cat watching from the pillow, moonlight through a window, the child's eyes half-closed but still arguing
